understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through the KA59 puzzle levels and win each level by positioning the selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked '+' is occupied simultaneously; completing the final level ends the run with an overall WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses MOVE_* actions to shift the currently selected piece by one 3-pixel cell per action in the chosen direction, with walls/boundaries potentially blocking or behaving non-uniformly, and with some adjacent objects (e.g., blocks) being pushable so they can be displaced when moved into. When multiple selectables exist, CLICK switches control to the selectable located exactly at the provided pixel coordinate (matching the positions listed in the state), after which movement applies to that newly selected piece; goals are satisfied only when selectables rest directly on the goal tile positions.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | Test whether the surrounding wall tiles truly block movement despite the heuristic showing blocked in all directions.
history.reasoning: Test whether the surrounding wall tiles truly block movement despite the heuristic showing blocked in all directions.

history.summary: Turn 2: MOVE_RIGHT | Test whether the right wall actually blocks movement or allows clipping/slide despite the blocked hint.
history.reasoning: Test whether the right wall actually blocks movement or allows clipping/slide despite the blocked hint.

history.summary: Turn 3: CLICK | Switch control to the other selectable at [18,21] to see if it can move or be used to push/unstick the pair.
history.reasoning: Switch control to the other selectable at [18,21] to see if it can move or be used to push/unstick the pair.

history.summary: Turn 4: CLICK | Switch to the other selectable so we can try pushing the selected piece into the wall to see if it passes/squeezes through.
history.reasoning: Switch to the other selectable so we can try pushing the selected piece into the wall to see if it passes/squeezes through.

history.summary: Turn 5: MOVE_RIGHT | Try to push the adjacent selectable to the right; even if marked blocked, it may still shift or reveal how collisions work here.
history.reasoning: Try to push the adjacent selectable to the right; even if marked blocked, it may still shift or reveal how collisions work here.

history.summary: Turn 6: CLICK | Switch control to the other selectable at [33,21] to try reaching the goal area since the current piece is fully blocked by walls.
history.reasoning: Switch control to the other selectable at [33,21] to try reaching the goal area since the current piece is fully blocked by walls.

history.summary: Turn 7: MOVE_RIGHT | Test moving right into the adjacent goal area despite the wall hint; it may allow entering the goal region.
history.reasoning: Test moving right into the adjacent goal area despite the wall hint; it may allow entering the goal region.

history.summary: Turn 8: MOVE_UP | Try moving up into the goal region above; the 'blocked' hint may include the non-collidable goal overlay.
history.reasoning: Try moving up into the goal region above; the 'blocked' hint may include the non-collidable goal overlay.
